nasb.text: And it will be that like a hunted gazelle, Or like sheep with none to gather them, They will each turn to his own people, And each one flee to his own land.

esv.text: And like a hunted gazelle, or like sheep with none to gather them, each will turn to his own people, and each will flee to his own land.

cnv.text: 人必像被追獵的羚羊， 又像無人招聚的羊群， 各自歸向本族， 各自逃回本地。

ccb.text: 人们都投奔亲族， 逃回故乡， 好像被追赶的鹿， 又如走散的羊。

csbs.text: 人必像被追赶的羚羊， 又像无人招聚的群羊， 各自归回本族， 各自逃到本土。
